title: Teltonika TRB245 Industrial LTE Cat 4 Gateway
description: Small and durable industrial LTE Cat 4 Gateway equipped with a number of Input/Output, Serial, Ethernet ports Number of features makes this Gateway perfect in application where legacy and modern industrial equipment must be integrated in one system Device LTE antenna (SMA male) GNMS antenna (SMA male) - 3m cable 16pin system connector Power adapter Mounting key Ethernet cable 1,5m QSG
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2G (GSM), 3G (GSM), LTE Connectors and Interfaces RF connectors (2) SMA male LAN speed (1) 10/100Mbps Serial port RS-232, RS-485 SIM slot Yes SIM slots quantity 2 Power Power type DC terminal Max. power consumption [W] 5 Power via connector/terminal 9 .. 30V DC Physical characteristics Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 75 Weight [g] 165 Width [mm] 83 Height [mm] 25 Depth [mm] 74 Hardware CPU QCA9531 CPU frequency [MHz] 650 Internal storage [MB] 16 RAM [MB] 64 Software Operating system RutOS (OpenWrt based Linux OS)
